headline: A Look At Zoetis (ZTS) Valuation After Guidance Cut Legal Actions And Companion Animal Headwinds
summary: Zoetis (ZTS) is back in focus after a cluster of securities class action filings, all tied to weakening demand, rising competition, and safety concerns in its flagship Companion Animal portfolio. See our latest analysis for Zoetis. At a share price of $79.52, Zoetis has seen short term volatility with a 1 day share price return of 2.49% and 7 day share price return of 1.60%. However, momentum has been weak over longer periods, with the 30 day share price return down 29.34%, the 90 day share...
